Why Al Kanz

Everything You Need to Succeed

Designed for busy people who still want to give real time to the words of Allah.

🕌

1-on-1 Sessions

Full undivided attention every class. Just you and your teacher.

⏱️

Just 30 Minutes

3 sessions a week. All it takes for genuine progress.

📅

Your Schedule

Pick 3 days per week. Morning, afternoon, or evening.

🎓

Qualified Mentors

Certified teachers with years of Quran education experience.

🚫

No Age Limit

7 or 70 — everyone progresses with confidence.

👩‍🎓

Brothers & Sisters

Female students matched with female teachers.

🏠

Learn From Home

Google Meet classes. No commute, your comfort.

💬

WhatsApp Access

Stay connected. Get guidance anytime.

What You’ll Learn

Our Curriculum

A structured, personal path tailored to where you are right now.

ﷺ
Beginners

Quran Reading Foundation

Arabic alphabet to fluent Quran reading — from absolute zero, step by step.

Beginners

Quran Reading Foundation

  • Arabic alphabet & pronunciation
  • Joining letters and forming words
  • Basic Tajweed rules gradually
  • Short Surahs and daily prayers
  • Building fluency and confidence
۞
Hifz Program

Quran Memorisation

Memorize the Quran at your own pace with a personal daily plan and revision cycles.

Hifz Program

Quran Memorisation

  • Personalised Hifz plan at your pace
  • Daily new lesson + revision
  • Structured revision cycles
  • Teacher tracks every Juz personally
  • Complete Hifz with strong retention
ﻵ
Tajweed

Rules of Recitation

Master the science of proper Quran pronunciation and beautiful recitation.

Tajweed

Rules of Recitation

  • Makharij al-Huroof
  • Noon & Meem Sakinah rules
  • Madd (elongation) rules
  • Waqf & Ibtida
  • Advanced intermediate rules
★
Advanced

Revision & Strengthening

For Huffaz — strengthen your memorization and prepare for leading Tarawih.

Advanced

Revision & Strengthening

  • Full Quran revision for Huffaz
  • Speed & fluency improvement
  • Granular Tajweed correction
  • Tarawih preparation
  • One-to-one teacher recitation
The Process

How It Works

From first message to first class — simple and personal.

ﷺ

Message Us on WhatsApp

Send “Hifzul Quran” to +91 6235 881 968.

۞

Assessment & Level Check

A 30-minute session to understand your level.

ﻵ

Choose Your Schedule

Pick 3 days and timing. Matched within 24 hours.

★

Your Journey Begins

30 minutes, 3 days a week. Ayah by ayah.

About Us

Al Kanz Academy

Al Kanz — meaning “The Treasure” — was founded on one belief: that the Quran belongs to everyone. No one should be held back by age, schedule, or circumstance.

Our teachers don’t just teach — they guide, motivate, and walk alongside every student on their journey.

We run one-to-one classes only. No batches. No shortcuts. Just real, personal attention.

Qualified TeachersHifz ProgramTajweed CoachingGoogle MeetBrothers & SistersAll Ages
